mapper.insert:
/* ESS방전량 등록 */ INSERT INTO tb_ess_discharge ( site_id, device_id, std_timestamp, std_date, dischg_val, reg_date, mod_date ) VALUES ( #{entity.siteId}, #{entity.deviceId}, #{entity.stdTimestamp}, #{entity.stdDate}, #{entity.dischgVal}, #{entity.regDate}, #{entity.modDate})
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
mapper.update:
/* ESS방전량 수정 */ UPDATE tb_ess_discharge
site_id = #{entity.siteId},
device_id = #{entity.deviceId},
std_timestamp = #{entity.stdTimestamp},
std_date = #{entity.stdDate},
dischg_val = #{entity.dischgVal},
reg_date = #{entity.regDate},
mod_date = #{entity.modDate},
WHERE ess_dischg_idx = #{entity.essDischgIdx}
mapper.select: /* ESS방전량 상세조회 */ SELECT ess_dischg_idx, site_id, device_id, std_timestamp, std_date, dischg_val, reg_date, mod_date FROM tb_ess_discharge WHERE ess_dischg_idx = #{essDischgIdx}

/* ESS방전량 목록조회 */ SELECT ess_dischg_idx, site_id, device_id, std_timestamp, std_date, dischg_val, reg_date, mod_date FROM tb_ess_discharge
WHERE LIMIT #{pageable.start}, #{pageable.end}
